productDisplayName: Fossil Men Blue Chronograph Watch CH2694
description: Style NoteThe heart and soul of the fossil brand is a unique kind of inspired creativity. This watch represents the brands concept of accessible cool, creative spirit and a sense of humor - which is also evident in the trademark collectible tin. Fossil creates modern yet vintage products for everyone, choose this watch to express you own creativity and authentic style.Product DetailsCase style: Analog watch with a stainless steel round case Dial style: Blue dial with white and silver hands Strap style: Black plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Three chronograph time displays, date apeture on the dial and branding on the 12 hour markWater resistant 10 ATM, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 46 mm Case thickness: 15 mmWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
